attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 1 AS BATCH_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_HEADER_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_LINE_NUM,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.APPLICATION_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_TRANSFER_MODE_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_SITE_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_TYPE_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENTERED_DR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENTERED_CR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_DR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_CR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.DESCRIPTION,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.STATISTICAL_AMOUNT,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.JGZZ_RECON_REF,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CONTROL_BALANCE_FLAG,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ANALYTICAL_BALANCE_FLAG,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE11,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE13,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.DISPLAYED_LINE_NUMBER,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATION_DATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATED_BY,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.REQUEST_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_BATCH_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID1,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID2,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID3,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GAIN_OR_LOSS_FLAG,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SUBSTITUTED_CCID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.BUSINESS_CLASS_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MPA_ACCRUAL_ENTRY_FLAG,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.FUNDS_STATUS_CODE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_PARTY_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_PARTY_SITE_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LEDGER_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_TABLE,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNT_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID,
 CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
,
 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME ,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
 SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_XLA_AE_LINES
 WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID ,AE_LINE_NUM ,APPLICATION_ID  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 )CDC_XLA_AE_LINES
 WHERE CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
